titleStmt.title: SII 26.538: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 538. (A.R. No. 508 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Ś. 1474, Paridhāvi, Chittirai 29, ba. (the tithi is not given). Monday, Rōhinī. The details may correspond to 1552 A.D., April 25, if it was Chittirai 30, śu. 2; f.d.t. º92; f.d.n. º00.

summary.p: This inscription also in Tamil verse, records that Nelvēli Māṟaṉ Viravēḷ Kulaśekarachcheḻiyaṉ also called Poṉṉiṉ Pāṇḍyaṉ was crowned at Kāśi (i.e., Teṉkāśi) (presided over by) Akilēśar who bore the Gaṅgā (Surar-āṟu) on the date quoted above, and states that a Vīraveṇbāmālai was composed by some poet to mark the occasion.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Eṟiya cākāttamāyirattu nāṉūṟṟe
ḻupattiṉāli variḻcam pari
tāpitaṉil mātan teṟiya cittirai
yirupattoṉpatākun tetiyiraṇ
ṭām pakkan tiṅkaḷu rokaṇi nāḷ
viṉuyarnta mituṉattu nelveli
māṟaṉ viraveḷ kulacekaracceḻiya
ṉeṉṟu curarāṟu puṉaiyakilecar
kāciyile viḷaṅkavaṇi mavulita
rittaṉaṉ pararācar paṇintaṉare
Eṭiyal mālai yaṇintālum vāṭume
ṉappulavor pāṭiya viraveṇpāmālai
yaip poṉṉiṉ pāṇṭiyaṉ porte
ṭiyaveṟ ceḻiyaṉ kulacekarat teṉṉaṉai
p poṟcūṭiya ventaruṇṭovoru ven
taraic collukile naṉṟāka §
Digital edition of SII 26.538 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
